_note: Rule-author registry for corpus-tool author!=labeler enforcement (Jonah's division of labor). The architect (sidecoach-architect) will AUTHOR the subjective extension rules, so the architect is registered as rule-author for every subjective class - which makes corpus-tool.verify REJECT any subjective label whose labeledBy is the architect. Subjective ground truth must be set by the lead-run INDEPENDENT Codex pass (labeledBy=codex). Objective classes are computed by spec-math and are not subject to this guard.
_boundary_moved_note: The 7 classes below were moved OBJECTIVE->SUBJECTIVE by the lead spec-crispness boundary ruling (2026-06-23): their thresholds are taste-calibrated (no spec constant two faithful impls must agree on), so they are labeled by the held Codex pass. tight-leading + extreme-negative-tracking joined this set when the lead sharpened the test ('extreme'/'tight' are fuzzy thresholds, not spec constants). Registered to the architect so the freeze gate rejects the architect labeling them.
